title: Policy Convergence Timer Map
purpose: Connects policy-convergence tracker lanes to Global Risk Clock lanes so new records, mandates, pilots, procurement, laws, and integrations can update the correct timers.
boundary: Timer movement is an editorial pressure signal, not a prediction or claim of certainty. Every timer update should be linked to a source class, evidence level, date, actor, jurisdiction, and record boundary.

evidenceLevels.5: Integration across two or more systems

mappings.timerTrigger: Global standards, treaties, model laws, funding conditions, or procurement rules begin routing into domestic mandates.
mappings.escalationRule: Escalate only when a soft-law or policy framework becomes a domestic mandate, procurement requirement, or integrated identity/money/security rule.

mappings.timerTrigger: Digital identity becomes mandatory, biometric, cross-border, or linked to money, travel, benefits, health, age verification, or online access.
mappings.escalationRule: Move from watch to active when identity is no longer optional for a major service; move higher when it integrates with payment or speech systems.

mappings.timerTrigger: CBDC, tokenized deposits, programmable compliance, cash restrictions, or identity-linked wallets move from papers into pilots, contracts, or mandates.
mappings.escalationRule: Escalate on procurement, legal mandate, banking rollout, wallet identity requirement, transaction restriction, or cross-border integration.

mappings.timerTrigger: War, cyber, terror, or emergency language expands surveillance, contractor access, censorship, or domestic security power.
mappings.escalationRule: Escalate when emergency powers renew, security contractors enter civilian systems, or domestic restrictions are justified by external conflict.

mappings.timerTrigger: Speech, search, payment, advertising, or platform access becomes governed by state-linked or public-private enforcement systems.
mappings.escalationRule: Escalate when enforcement moves from platform policy into law, payment rails, search suppression, identity gating, or state-linked flagging.

mappings.timerTrigger: Health governance connects to identity, travel, work, emergency law, procurement, digital records, or speech policy.
mappings.escalationRule: Escalate when health credentials or emergency powers become tied to travel, work, benefits, data exchange, or identity wallets.

mappings.timerTrigger: Climate or energy policy moves into carbon accounts, smart-meter enforcement, mobility restrictions, food/farm controls, ESG finance, or emergency powers.
mappings.escalationRule: Escalate when policy becomes mandatory, financially enforced, linked to payments, or restricts movement, energy, food, or land use.

mappings.timerTrigger: Migration, border, biometric, NGO-state, housing, labor, or digital travel systems become integrated with identity and security infrastructure.
mappings.escalationRule: Escalate when border biometrics become national identity rails, emergency contracts expand, or security narratives drive domestic powers.

mappings.timerTrigger: Food, water, land, seed, farm, fertilizer, traceability, rationing, or supply-chain rules become centralized through corporate-state policy networks.
mappings.escalationRule: Escalate when rules pressure local production, mandate traceability, concentrate ownership, or link food access to identity, carbon, or finance systems.

timerUpdateMethod: Classify the found item by tracker lane.
Attach source link, actor, date, jurisdiction, and record boundary.
Update linked clock notes and nextRoute to control-system-tracker.html when relevant.
Only raise homepageEligible when score is 90 or above and the signal is time-sensitive.
Never update a timer from rumor alone. Use rumor only as an open-source lead.
